error_signature: This execution failed to be processed too many times
title: Execution fails to process due to worker lock duration
symptom: Workflows complete successfully, but an error workflow is triggered with a warning about execution processing failures. This occurs multiple times a day.
applies_when: Error workflow is set up for monitoring
not_this_if: Error workflow is not triggered for successful executions
root_cause: The error occurs because the worker processing the workflow is unable to complete its task within the default lock duration, leading to premature termination and triggering the error workflow despite the main workflow completing successfully.
fix_steps: Increase the value from 60 seconds to 120 seconds
Save the changes and restart n8n
agent_instruction: Increase the QUEUE_WORKER_LOCK_DURATION to 120 seconds in your n8n configuration.
